TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mark Richard Acres 1962 neng 11 gat 15 nici hiya ga sinsyuw na semung pbu' mari na NBA, misuw qani lga wal malax la. Mark Richard Acres hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, praw maki' tayglaing, pkaki' kkska' tay suruw. Kinwagiq niya ga 211 senci, kinusuw niya ga 100 kg, snpung nha ki'an nya ga pglang te glang ru psru te ska' balay. Banggo nya' ga te 42. Minkahul squ raygak na Oral Roberts ru maki squ pwazyaw sa baq balay mzyuwi mari na NBA te kwas 1985 ga pinpusal thwiru nqu binkgan te 16 lga, wal galun kya na Talas syaw nya kya la. Misuw qani lga cyux mgsinsiy na pcbaq unro kya cyuwgak na Cya Cow la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mark riʦ~ʨħar* aʦ~ʨres~ɕ **** neŋ ** ɣat ** niʦ~ʨi ħija ɣa s~ɕins~ɕjuw na s~ɕemuŋ pβuʔ mari na nβa, mis~ɕuw qani lɣa wal malax la. mark riʦ~ʨħar* aʦ~ʨres~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ, pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kinwaɣiq nija ɣa *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨi, kinus~ɕuw nija ɣa *** kɣ, s~ɕnpuŋ nħa kiʔan nja ɣa pɣlaŋ te ɣlaŋ ru ps~ɕru te s~ɕkaʔ βalaj. βaŋɣo njaʔ ɣa te **. minkaħul s~ɕqu rajɣak na oral roβerts~ɕ ru maki s~ɕqu pwazjaw s~ɕa βaq βalaj mzjuwi mari na nβa te kwas~ɕ **** ɣa pinpus~ɕal tħwiru nqu βinkɣan te ** lɣa, wal ɣalun kja na talas~ɕ s~ɕjaw nja kja la. mis~ɕuw qani lɣa ʦ~ʨjux mɣs~ɕins~ɕij na pʦ~ʨβaq unro kja ʦ~ʨjuwɣak na ʦ~ʨja ʦ~ʨow la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Mark Richard Acres 1962 neng 11 gat 15 nici hiya ga sinsyuw na semung pbu' mari na NBA, misuw qani lga wal malax la. Mark Richard Acres hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, praw maki' tayglaing, pkaki' kkska' tay suruw. Kinwagiq niya ga 211 senci, kinusuw niya ga 100 kg, snpung nha ki'an nya ga pglang te glang ru psru te ska' balay. Banggo nya' ga te 42. Minkahul squ raygak na Oral Roberts ru maki squ pwazyaw sa baq balay mzyuwi mari na NBA te kwas 1985 ga pinpusal thwiru nqu binkgan te 16 lga, wal galun kya na Talas syaw nya kya la. Misuw qani lga cyux mgsinsiy na pcbaq unro kya cyuwgak na Cya Cow la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mark riʦ~ʨħar* aʦ~ʨres~ɕ **** neŋ ** ɣat ** niʦ~ʨi ħija ɣa s~ɕins~ɕjuw na s~ɕemuŋ pβuʔ mari na nβa, mis~ɕuw qani lɣa wal malax la. mark riʦ~ʨħar* aʦ~ʨres~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ, pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kinwaɣiq nija ɣa *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨi, kinus~ɕuw nija ɣa *** kɣ, s~ɕnpuŋ nħa kiʔan nja ɣa pɣlaŋ te ɣlaŋ ru ps~ɕru te s~ɕkaʔ βalaj. βaŋɣo njaʔ ɣa te **. minkaħul s~ɕqu rajɣak na oral roβerts~ɕ ru maki s~ɕqu pwazjaw s~ɕa βaq βalaj mzjuwi mari na nβa te kwas~ɕ **** ɣa pinpus~ɕal tħwiru nqu βinkɣan te ** lɣa, wal ɣalun kja na talas~ɕ s~ɕjaw nja kja la. mis~ɕuw qani lɣa ʦ~ʨjux mɣs~ɕins~ɕij na pʦ~ʨβaq unro kja ʦ~ʨjuwɣak na ʦ~ʨja ʦ~ʨow la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
